title: OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM - 211info
text: FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal camping, free garbage disposal, and portable restrooms for those living in their vehicles (tents are not allowed). Participants are hosted by faith communities, businesses, nonprofit organizations, or government offices. 4060 W Amazon Drive Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18 who are homeless or at risk of becoming homeless and living in their vehicle (RV, trailer, motorhome, truck, car, van, or tiny house) Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 342-7728 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 342-7728 Main phone Main phone (541) 342-7728 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website and fill out a Parking Enrollment Form or call for space availability FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on LTD bus routes 24, 28, and 36. Services: Homeless Safe Parking Programs Homeless Safe Parking Programs * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - NIGHT SHELTER ANNEX If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER
